items.title: S01E01 - Werewolf (pilot)
items.summary: College student Eric Cord is turned into a werewolf by his roommate shortly before he is forced to kill him. Eric sets out on a quest to locate and kill Skorzeny, the source of the werewolf bloodline, thus lifting his curse: while keeping ahead of Alamo Joe, a bounty hunter determined to bring him in.

infolabels.title: Werewolf (pilot)
infolabels.plot: College student Eric Cord is turned into a werewolf by his roommate shortly before he is forced to kill him. Eric sets out on a quest to locate and kill Skorzeny, the source of the werewolf bloodline, thus lifting his curse: while keeping ahead of Alamo Joe, a bounty hunter determined to bring him in.

items.title: S01E02 - Nightwatch
items.summary: After trailing Skorzeny to a shipyard, Eric is set upon by a pair of seamen looking to collect the bounty on his head.

infolabels.title: Nightwatch
infolabels.plot: After trailing Skorzeny to a shipyard, Eric is set upon by a pair of seamen looking to collect the bounty on his head.

items.title: S01E03 - The Boy Who Cried Werewolf
items.summary: Injured by Rogan, Eric seeks shelter in a young boy's treehouse, and soon runs afoul of his mother's abusive boyfriend.

infolabels.title: The Boy Who Cried Werewolf
infolabels.plot: Injured by Rogan, Eric seeks shelter in a young boy's treehouse, and soon runs afoul of his mother's abusive boyfriend.

items.title: S01E04 - The Black Ship
items.summary: Eric is captured by an old friend of Skorzeny's and must find a way to escape before Skorzeny comes for him.

infolabels.title: The Black Ship
infolabels.plot: Eric is captured by an old friend of Skorzeny's and must find a way to escape before Skorzeny comes for him.

items.title: S01E05 - Spectre of the Wolf
items.summary: Eric consults Dr. DeGoethels, a well known author and professor of werewolf lore, for help in finding a cure.

infolabels.title: Spectre of the Wolf
infolabels.plot: Eric consults Dr. DeGoethels, a well known author and professor of werewolf lore, for help in finding a cure.

items.title: S01E06 - The Wolf Who Thought He Was a Man
items.summary: While on the road, Eric meets up with a hunter who takes the phrase 'hunt like a wolf' a little too far.

infolabels.title: The Wolf Who Thought He Was a Man
infolabels.plot: While on the road, Eric meets up with a hunter who takes the phrase 'hunt like a wolf' a little too far.

items.title: S01E07 - Nothing Evil in These Woods
items.summary: Lost in the woods, Eric happens upon a local witch who claims she has the power to rid him of his curse.

infolabels.title: Nothing Evil in These Woods
infolabels.plot: Lost in the woods, Eric happens upon a local witch who claims she has the power to rid him of his curse.

items.title: S01E08 - Running with the Pack
items.summary: Working at a small diner to make ends meet, Eric gets more than he bargained for when a cutthroat motorcycle gang rides into town.

infolabels.title: Running with the Pack
infolabels.plot: Working at a small diner to make ends meet, Eric gets more than he bargained for when a cutthroat motorcycle gang rides into town.

items.title: S01E09 - Friendly Haven
items.summary: Eric takes refuge at the home of an old woman while being chased by Skorzeny.

infolabels.title: Friendly Haven
infolabels.plot: Eric takes refuge at the home of an old woman while being chased by Skorzeny.

items.title: S01E10 - Let Us Prey
items.summary: Chasing reports of a wild cougar, Eric takes refuge at a monastery where he soon learns that some of the staff prey in a different way at night.

infolabels.title: Let Us Prey
infolabels.plot: Chasing reports of a wild cougar, Eric takes refuge at a monastery where he soon learns that some of the staff prey in a different way at night.

items.title: S01E11 - A World of Difference (part 1)
items.summary: Rogan finds Eric locked up in a small town, but when his captive changes into a werewolf and escapes, the bounty hunter finds he's no match for the hunting skills of the wolf.

infolabels.title: A World of Difference (part 1)
infolabels.plot: Rogan finds Eric locked up in a small town, but when his captive changes into a werewolf and escapes, the bounty hunter finds he's no match for the hunting skills of the wolf.

items.title: S01E12 - A World of Difference (part 2)
items.summary: In the hospital recovering from a werewolf attack, Rogan reflects on how to deal with his dilemma. Things get sidetracked in a hurry when he learns that Eric isn't dead after all.

infolabels.title: A World of Difference (part 2)
infolabels.plot: In the hospital recovering from a werewolf attack, Rogan reflects on how to deal with his dilemma. Things get sidetracked in a hurry when he learns that Eric isn't dead after all.

items.title: S01E13 - The Unicorn
items.summary: Eric gets kidnapped by a pimp when he saves one of his charges from a brutal beating. Meanwhile, Rogan is hot on Eric's trail, not realizing he's actually closer to finding Skorzeny.

infolabels.title: The Unicorn
infolabels.plot: Eric gets kidnapped by a pimp when he saves one of his charges from a brutal beating. Meanwhile, Rogan is hot on Eric's trail, not realizing he's actually closer to finding Skorzeny.

items.title: S01E14 - All Hallow's Eve
items.summary: Eric holes up in an abandoned house on Halloween night in order to lock himself up before the change, not realizing that the house isn't actually abandoned.

infolabels.title: All Hallow's Eve
infolabels.plot: Eric holes up in an abandoned house on Halloween night in order to lock himself up before the change, not realizing that the house isn't actually abandoned.

items.title: S01E15 - Blood on the Tracks
items.summary: Eric gets a job working the railroads and runs into one of his childhood heroes, a former heavyweight champion with some demons of his own.

infolabels.title: Blood on the Tracks
infolabels.plot: Eric gets a job working the railroads and runs into one of his childhood heroes, a former heavyweight champion with some demons of his own.

items.title: S01E16 - Nightmare at the Braine Hotel
items.summary: Eric crosses paths with a slasher and a sinister hotel manager.

infolabels.title: Nightmare at the Braine Hotel
infolabels.plot: Eric crosses paths with a slasher and a sinister hotel manager.

items.title: S01E17 - Wolfhunt
items.summary: Eric and a wolf form a bond of friendship out in the wild, but a rancher is out to hunt them both down with silver bullets thanks to a visit from Rogan.

infolabels.title: Wolfhunt
infolabels.plot: Eric and a wolf form a bond of friendship out in the wild, but a rancher is out to hunt them both down with silver bullets thanks to a visit from Rogan.

items.title: S01E18 - Blood Ties
items.summary: Working as a groundskeeper at a high class residence, Eric must clear his name when he is framed for murder.

infolabels.title: Blood Ties
infolabels.plot: Working as a groundskeeper at a high class residence, Eric must clear his name when he is framed for murder.

items.title: S01E19 - Big Daddy
items.summary: Forcefully taken by a state trooper to Big Daddy Frasier's home, Eric learns that Big Daddy has an idea of what Eric can do to help cure his cancer.

infolabels.title: Big Daddy
infolabels.plot: Forcefully taken by a state trooper to Big Daddy Frasier's home, Eric learns that Big Daddy has an idea of what Eric can do to help cure his cancer.

items.title: S01E20 - Eye of the Storm
items.summary: Eric finds himself in the middle of a murder mystery at the Simms Lodge. He convinces the other lodgers to work together in order to find the culprit, but his plans change when he is about to.

infolabels.title: Eye of the Storm
infolabels.plot: Eric finds himself in the middle of a murder mystery at the Simms Lodge. He convinces the other lodgers to work together in order to find the culprit, but his plans change when he is about to.

items.title: S01E21 - Nightmare in Blue
items.summary: The long arm of the law finds Eric when he is at his most vulnerable. To make matters worse, Rogan's reach is even closer.

infolabels.title: Nightmare in Blue
infolabels.plot: The long arm of the law finds Eric when he is at his most vulnerable. To make matters worse, Rogan's reach is even closer.

items.title: S01E22 - Skinwalker
items.summary: Eric learns that the Native American legend of the Skinwalker is true, and that it's up to him to stop the bloodshed.

infolabels.title: Skinwalker
infolabels.plot: Eric learns that the Native American legend of the Skinwalker is true, and that it's up to him to stop the bloodshed.

items.title: S01E23 - King of the Road
items.summary: Hopping a train, Eric runs afoul of a group of homeless travelers trying to escape a 'ripper' who's been preying on vagrants in their small hometown.

infolabels.title: King of the Road
infolabels.plot: Hopping a train, Eric runs afoul of a group of homeless travelers trying to escape a 'ripper' who's been preying on vagrants in their small hometown.

items.title: S01E24 - A Material Girl
items.summary: Eric chases Skorzeny into a mall after business hours. He meets a girl who lives there and learns he wasn't chasing Skorzeny all along.

infolabels.title: A Material Girl
infolabels.plot: Eric chases Skorzeny into a mall after business hours. He meets a girl who lives there and learns he wasn't chasing Skorzeny all along.

items.title: S01E25 - To Dream of Wolves (part 1)
items.summary: Eric finally tracks down Skorzeny, but learns that contrary to what he was told, his old nemesis is NOT the originator of their bloodline.

infolabels.title: To Dream of Wolves (part 1)
infolabels.plot: Eric finally tracks down Skorzeny, but learns that contrary to what he was told, his old nemesis is NOT the originator of their bloodline.

items.title: S01E26 - To Dream of Wolves (part 2)
items.summary: Eric breaks into the home of Nicolas Remy and learns that Remy is the one he must destroy in order to rid himself of his curse.

infolabels.title: To Dream of Wolves (part 2)
infolabels.plot: Eric breaks into the home of Nicolas Remy and learns that Remy is the one he must destroy in order to rid himself of his curse.

items.title: S01E27 - Blind Luck
items.summary: Working at a carnival, Eric runs afoul of a group of schemers who are taking advantage of blind women.

infolabels.title: Blind Luck
infolabels.plot: Working at a carnival, Eric runs afoul of a group of schemers who are taking advantage of blind women.

items.title: S01E28 - Gray Wolf
items.summary: While being chased by Rogan, Eric meets an old werewolf from another bloodline. Together they can defeat Remy, but only if Eric can keep the man on his side.

infolabels.title: Gray Wolf
infolabels.plot: While being chased by Rogan, Eric meets an old werewolf from another bloodline. Together they can defeat Remy, but only if Eric can keep the man on his side.

items.title: S01E29 - Amazing Grace
items.summary: Eric saves an old lady who loves to tell stories from two thugs. Soon she is placed in a mental institution and Eric tries to break her out.

infolabels.title: Amazing Grace
infolabels.plot: Eric saves an old lady who loves to tell stories from two thugs. Soon she is placed in a mental institution and Eric tries to break her out.
